title: feat: add audio caching via media cache middleware
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Echoes in the hive
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our caching system to support audio generation. Repeated text-to-speech requests now return instantly, making your voice apps snappier than ever.
gist.summary: Extracted the existing image caching logic into a unified media cache middleware and applied it to the audio generation endpoints.
gist.impact: Developers will experience instant response times for repeated audio requests, significantly improving performance for text-to-speech and music applications.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing headphones, organizing glowing musical notes into a storage box. The Robot companion displaying a soundwave on its screen, representing the new audio caching capability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, carefully placing a glowing musical note into a lime green (#ecf874) storage box. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head displays a soundwave on its screen. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
